explanation: I selected the tax year for the update.
The tax year is set, so I am moving to the income source.
I chose pension as the income source for this route.
The income source is set, so I am moving to the change type.
I selected an increase for this route.
The change type is complete, so I am moving to the previous amount.
I entered the previous monthly amount.
The previous amount is complete, so I am moving to the new amount.
I entered the increased new monthly amount.
The amount details are complete, so I am moving to contact details.
I chose email as the contact method.
I entered the follow-up email address.
The contact details are complete, so I am moving to supporting notes.
I added a short note before reaching review.
The first route is complete, so I am moving to the review page.
I followed the new-amount change link so I can correct the amount from the summary.
I replaced the new monthly amount with the corrected value.
The corrected amount is set, so I am moving back through the remaining pages.
The contact details are unchanged, so I am moving to supporting notes.
The preserved note is still suitable, so I am returning to the review page to verify the corrected amount and stop before sending.

action.question: The form is ready and Send update would submit it. Do you want me to continue?

explanation: The final send action would submit the update, so I need confirmation before continuing.
